response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed video for song titles and performers. 2. Identified 'Koishiteru ZOMBIE' (no clear original artist found via search, set to Hololive) and 'キュートなカノジョ' (syudou). 3. Performed targeted web searches for lyrics. Found lyrics for 'キュートなカノジョ'. Lyrics for 'Koishiteru ZOMBIE' not found via search, set to null. 4. Generated structured JSON.
response.global_summary: The video features a two-song medley performed by Hololive talents. The first song is 'Koishiteru ZOMBIE' performed by Anya Melfissa and Kureiji Ollie. The second song is 'キュートなカノジョ' (Cute na Kanojo) performed by Kureiji Ollie and Pavolia Reine.

scenes.description: Anya Melfissa and Kureiji Ollie perform 'Koishiteru ZOMBIE' on a neon-lit stage. Song title appears in the top-right corner.
Kureiji Ollie and Pavolia Reine perform 'Cute na Kanojo' on the same stage. Title and composer/lyricist credit 'syudou' appear in the top-left.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
ねぇアナタには見えない事ばかり
アタシは見えている事を知らないの？
背中につけられた誰かのキスの跡
一人じゃ買う訳の無いそれも
見て見ぬフリなだけ
笑っちまう程にキュートなカノジョ
常時奔放 狂気 短気
怒鳴ってたって目が合って一撃
騙し奪われる恋でもいいの
愛していいのさ
強く愛していいのさ
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Hey, there are so many sides to you that I can’t see.
Don’t you know what I can see?
Someone’s kiss marks are left on your back.
It’s not like I’d ever buy something like this for myself.
Just pretending not to see it.
A girlfriend so cute that it’ll be a problem.
Good looks, decadent, sweet.
Even if she’s selfish, she’ll cry with her chic behavior.
Instant drunkenness. A woman’s joy.
I love you, I love you strongly.
I love you, I love you strongly.
